formInstance.inputDocument: On 2024/12/05, an individual known as John Doe, holding the position of Founder, initiated a Non-Disclosure Agreement ("NDA") for the purpose expressly defined as "To protect intellectual property related to a new software development project, including source code, architecture, and design." This NDA, submitted by Mr. Doe, is set to remain active for a duration of 5 years. Mr. Doe, acting as both the Party and Representative, affirms that he has read and agrees to the terms of the Non-Disclosure Agreement and confirms that he has the authority to enter into this agreement.

goldAnswers.Purpose of NDA: To protect intellectual property related to a new software development project, including source code, architecture, and design
